umm.digiquilt.view.fabriccontrols
Interface FabricListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
ReplaceAllColorPanel, ShapesPalette
public interface FabricListener

Interface for getting notified when a new fabric is chosen, and what that fabric is.

Author:
biatekjt, created Aug 31, 2008

Method Summary
 void newFabricSelected(Fabric newFabric)
          Called when a new fabric is selected.
 

Method Detail

newFabricSelected

void newFabricSelected(Fabric newFabric)
Called when a new fabric is selected.

Parameters:
newFabric - the fabric that was selected.
